title: To Lady Noel Byron
content:
Men sought, ambition's thirst to slake,
        The lost elixir old
        Whose magic touch should instant make
        The meaner metals gold.

        A nobler alchymy is thine
        Which love from pain doth press:
        Gold in thy hand becomes divine,
        Grows truth and tenderness.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, George MacDonald delivers a powerful performance in "To Lady Noel Byron"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
